---
title: The impacts of changing transport and precipitation on pollutant distributions
  in a future climate
pagetitle: 2011-9-1-Fang2011a - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2011
author: Yuanyuan Fang, Arlene M. Fiore, Larry W. Horowitz, Anand Gnanadesikan, Isaac
  M. Held, Gang Chen, Gabriel Vecchi and Hiram Levy
venue: Journal of Geophysical Research
venue_cit: <i>Journal of Geophysical Research</i>, 116, D18303, doi:10.1029/2011JD015642.
recommended_citation: 'Yuanyuan Fang, Arlene M. Fiore, Larry W. Horowitz, Anand Gnanadesikan,
  Isaac M. Held, Gang Chen, Gabriel Vecchi and Hiram Levy, 2011: The impacts of changing
  transport and precipitation on pollutant distributions in a future climate, <i>Journal
  of Geophysical Research</i>, 116, D18303, doi:10.1029/2011JD015642.'
paper_url: http://doi.wiley.com/10.1029/2011JD015642
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# The impacts of changing transport and precipitation on pollutant distributions in a future climate

*Published in Journal of Geophysical Research, 2011*

**Recommended citation:** Yuanyuan Fang, Arlene M. Fiore, Larry W. Horowitz, Anand Gnanadesikan, Isaac M. Held, Gang Chen, Gabriel Vecchi and Hiram Levy, 2011: The impacts of changing transport and precipitation on pollutant distributions in a future climate, <i>Journal of Geophysical Research</i>, 116, D18303, doi:10.1029/2011JD015642.

[Download paper](http://doi.wiley.com/10.1029/2011JD015642){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
